description.value: While most androids in the Pact Worlds were formed by humanoid cultures with physiologies and capabilities resembling those of humans, the desire to create synthetic life transcends—and possibly even predates—humanity itself. The xenometric android versatile heritage can be applied to any non-constructed ancestry, other than human, to represent an android created in the image of a non-human ancestry. Like the androids in Starfinder Player Core, these androids still use nanite technology, gain the android trait, and can take android feats (in addition to those of their base ancestry, and xenometric android feats).
